title: Hospital Lockdown in Gastonia After Suspect Escape
summary: CaroMont Regional Medical Center locked down after a suspect escaped police custody within the facility.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential security vulnerabilities within local medical facilities and the risk to public safety.

title: Charlotte City Council to Decide on Mayor Lyles' Replacement
summary: Charlotte City Council will decide who fills Mayor Vi Lyles' seat within two months; process details coming in June.
charlotte_impact: The selection of a new mayor will significantly impact Charlotte's political landscape.

title: Sunshine for Mother's Day, Rain Expected Monday
summary: Mother's Day will be sunny, but a cold front is bringing showers and thunderstorms on Monday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast relevant to local residents planning weekend activities.

title: Two Dead in Overnight Charlotte Shooting
summary: Police responded to a shooting on Rozzelles Ferry Road where two people were found dead.
charlotte_impact: Contributes to concerns about rising gun violence in the Charlotte area.

title: East Charlotte Residents Oppose Proposed Data Center
summary: Residents are pushing back against a proposed data center, demanding stronger regulations and more public input.
charlotte_impact: Reflects community concerns about the environmental and social impact of new developments.

title: Councilmember Discusses Budget, Toll Lanes, Data Centers
summary: Councilmember Graham discusses the city budget, I-77 toll lanes, and land use for data centers.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into key issues being addressed by Charlotte City Council.

title: Shooting in Northwest Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot in northwest Charlotte; the victim was found in Huntersville and taken to a hospital.

title: Fire Cancels Weekend Games at Hickory Stadium
summary: A fire at L. P. Frans Stadium in Hickory caused heavy damage, leading to the cancellation of weekend games.

title: Traffic Backed Up on I-85 Due to Collisions
summary: Two separate crashes caused traffic delays on I-85 in Charlotte on Saturday afternoon.

summary: Two fatal car accidents occurred in Catawba County within hours of each other; no charges expected.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South in Charlotte
summary: A fatal crash on I-85 South near Little Rock Road is under investigation.

summary: A competency hearing is scheduled for Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska.

summary: A woman was raped at a vape shop in north Charlotte; a suspect has been arrested.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
